notes: Traces three of the four mantles roughly but drops most of the arm/tentacle cluster and fills the bodies with broken photo-trace fragments instead of FAO-style stipple.
specific_issues: fourth squid from the input photo is missing entirely
arms and tentacles on the right side of each squid are essentially absent — only stub fragments remain
eyes rendered as tiny dots rather than the FAO almond shape with pupil
interior 'detail' is noisy disconnected edge segments (photo-trace clutter), not concentrated stipple in chromatophore fields
fin/mantle outline breaks and stutters in several places rather than a clean continuous silhouette
head/funnel structure indistinct, looks like leftover trace noise rather than anatomy
